configuration_notes: Replace {{backend_base_url}} with the public HTTPS URL of the FastAPI service.
For POST and PATCH tools, enable Retell's Payload: args only option so FastAPI receives the flat JSON body it expects.
Do not put the Cliniko API key in Retell. The FastAPI service owns Cliniko authentication.
FastAPI verifies X-Retell-Signature on /retell/* adapter routes. Retell supplies this header automatically; do not configure the Retell or Cliniko API key as a custom-function header.
Before a production launch, protect write operations with idempotency keys or persisted operation records because Retell may retry failed custom-function calls.
Patient and appointment IDs are trusted IDs returned by earlier tools and must never be requested from the caller.

tools.name: find_or_create_patient
tools.description: Find a Cliniko patient by normalized phone number, or create the patient when no match exists. This can write data, so confirm the caller's full name and phone number before calling. If multiple patients share the phone number, stop and escalate instead of guessing.

phone.description: The caller's confirmed phone number, including country code when known.

tools.name: list_patient_appointments
tools.description: List a known Cliniko patient's non-cancelled appointments in chronological order. By default returns only upcoming appointments. Use the patient_id returned by find_or_create_patient; never ask the caller for an internal ID.

path_dynamic_variables.patient_id: Trusted Cliniko patient ID returned by find_or_create_patient.

include_past.description: Keep false for voice scheduling so only upcoming, non-cancelled appointments are returned.

tools.name: search_availability
tools.description: Search Cliniko for available appointment start times. Searches are read-only, dates use YYYY-MM-DD, and the inclusive search window must not exceed seven days.

business_id.description: Confirmed Cliniko business ID as a string.

practitioner_id.description: Confirmed Cliniko practitioner ID as a string.

appointment_type_id.description: Confirmed Cliniko appointment type ID as a string.

from_date.description: First local calendar date to search in YYYY-MM-DD format.

to_date.description: Last local calendar date to search in YYYY-MM-DD format, no more than seven days after from_date.

tools.name: book_appointment
tools.description: Create one Cliniko appointment after the caller explicitly confirms the patient, clinic, practitioner, appointment type, and timezone-aware start time. Call once only; do not automatically retry a failed creation.

patient_id.description: Cliniko patient ID returned by find_or_create_patient.

starts_at.description: Confirmed available start time as timezone-aware ISO 8601.

tools.name: reschedule_appointment
tools.description: Move the Cliniko appointment selected from list_patient_appointments after the caller explicitly confirms it and the new timezone-aware start time. Call once only; do not automatically retry.

appointment_id.description: Trusted internal Cliniko appointment ID selected from list_patient_appointments. Never ask the caller for it.

starts_at.description: The newly confirmed start time as timezone-aware ISO 8601.

tools.name: cancel_appointment
tools.description: Cancel the Cliniko appointment selected from list_patient_appointments without deleting it, after the caller explicitly confirms the appointment and cancellation. Call once only; do not automatically retry.

appointment_id.description: Trusted internal Cliniko appointment ID selected from list_patient_appointments. Never ask the caller for it.

cancellation_reason.description: Cliniko reason code: 10 feeling better, 20 condition worse, 30 sick, 40 away, 50 other, 60 work.

note.description: Optional brief note only when the caller provides useful additional context. Do not invent one.

request_example.note: Work meeting moved to the same time.
